title: SolutionCatalog
description: Deterministic catalogue of solution blocks derived from functional/non-functional requirements, constraints and client context. Bridges requirements to downstream technology research.

document_id.description: Optional ID of the source document.

solution_blocks.description: Thematic solution blocks, each clustering one or more requirements into a solution need.

block_id.description: Unique ID of the solution block (e.g. SB-01).

title.description: Short title of the solution block, in output_language.

description.description: What capability/need this block covers, derived from the requirements, in output_language.

addressed_requirements.description: FR/NFR IDs this block addresses (e.g. FR-001, NFR-002).

aspect_ids.description: Optional aspect IDs from the source analysis this block relates to.

solution_type.description: Category of solution needed (e.g. Integration, Datenplattform, Frontend, Security, Cloud-Infra).

priority.description: Highest MoSCoW priority among the addressed requirements.

constraints.description: Relevant technical/budget/organisational constraints bounding this block, taken from ConstraintsResult.

evaluation_criteria.description: Criteria to evaluate candidate technologies for this block.

candidate_directions.description: Plausible technology directions (families, not concrete products) considered for this block.

research_questions.description: Concrete research questions handed to the downstream web-search research step.

needs_clarification.description: True if user clarification is required before research (multiple directions, low confidence, or insufficient constraints).

clarification_reason.description: Why clarification is needed. Present only when needs_clarification is true.

clarification_question.description: Question to ask the user, in output_language. Present only when needs_clarification is true.

confidence.description: Confidence that the block is well-scoped for research (0-1).

tender_mandated.description: True when the tender itself prescribes a concrete technology/product for this block; such blocks are adopted decisively without web option-comparison or citations.

coverage.description: Coverage statistics of requirements across all solution blocks.

total_requirements.description: Total number of FR+NFR in the input.

covered_requirements.description: Number of requirements addressed by at least one block.

uncovered_requirement_ids.description: IDs of requirements not addressed by any block.

errors.description: Error block for validation or processing errors.
